info.name: CSV Processor API
info.description: Collection for testing the Concurrent CSV Data Processor API

request.description: Returns all employees from the input CSV file (test_employees.csv)

Processes all employee salaries concurrently using thread pool. Applies salary increments based on:
- Project completion (must be >= 60%)
- Years of service (2% per year)
- Role (Director: 5%, Manager: 2%, Employee: 1%)

Saves results to updated_employees.csv
Returns all employees from the output CSV file (updated_employees.csv) after processing
